[38;5;246m[49m  ⎿  (no content)[39m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231mwrite to /tmp/a.json hello[39m
[49m
[38;5;246m⏺[39m [1mWrite[0m(/tmp/a.json)

[39m [1m[38;5;153mCreate file[0m
 [38;5;246m../../../../tmp/a.json[39m

[39m [2m[38;5;231m 1 [0m[38;5;231mhello[39m
